title: Sykesia rotundifolia
taxonomy: Sykesia rotundifolia is classified under the family Lycaenidae and the order Lepidoptera. It is a species of butterfly native to the Western Ghats in India. The classification of this species is further divided into the subfamily Lycaeninae. Sykesia rotundifolia is closely related to other species in the same genus and family. The classification of Sykesia rotundifolia is an important aspect of its identification and conservation.

intro: Sykesia rotundifolia is a flowering plant species belonging to the genus Sykesia, native to the Western Himalayas. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing stress and improving overall well-being. Bioactive constituents present in Sykesia rotundifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Sykesia rotundifolia is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
